name: Old World Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the spaghetti sauce recipe for sauce.
2. Add 1 tablespoon olive oil to a 3-quart pot of boiling water.
3. Add 12 pieces of Lasagna noodles in two batches at a time to the boiling water.
4. Cook uncovered for 15 minutes. Drain and rinse the lasagna noodles in cold water, then set aside.
5. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Grease a 13x9x2 dish.
7. Start layering with spaghetti sauce, alternating 1/3 of the sauce, 1/3 cooked lasagna noodles, 1/3 ricotta cheese, 1/3 mozzarella cheese, and 1/3 grated parmesan cheese.
8. Repeat the layering process two more times, ending with a final layer of parmesan cheese on top.
9. Bake uncovered for 45 minutes.
10. Let stand for 15 minutes before cutting.
